title: limnophyton fluitans
intro: Limnophyton fluitans, also known as the floating fern, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Limnophyton fluitans include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, Limnophyton fluitans can be made into a tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
